title: sphaeropteris papuana
intro: Sphaeropteris papuana, also known as the King Fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, including Papua New Guinea. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris papuana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds can be made into a tea or infusion, while the rhizome can be used to make a decoction, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
